# Watch Face FlatBuffer Vectors

These vectors characterize the watch-face configuration FlatBuffer and KVTX script behavior before KMP extraction. They intentionally store semantic fields rather than fixed FlatBuffer bytes so Android, iOS, and common tests can verify equivalent round-trip behavior even if each platform's builder emits layout-equivalent but byte-different buffers. `WatchFaceCommonPolicyTest.kt` now executes shared field defaulting, complication ID ordering and preservation, known complication lookup, malformed too-short defaulting, KVTX wrapper metadata, unknown-complication enum lookup policy, and `watch-face-readiness.json` behavior-family coverage before production watch-face model code moves.

`watch-face-readiness.json` names the pre-migration behavior-family gate for watch-face model migration: default field zeroing, scalar field round-trip, complication ID ordering, empty complication ID preservation, known complication lookup, unknown raw complication ID preservation with null enum lookup, malformed too-short defaulting, KVTX wrapper metadata, platform watch-face vector references, and the `compile-verification-gate` must remain covered before watch-face model code moves into shared KMP.
